# docs-cockpit refine prompts · auto-generated by `docs-cockpit build`

Each `M<id>.md` is a self-contained prompt the user can pipe to any LLM CLI.
Example flow(any of these):

```bash
# pipe one module's prompt to Claude Code
cat docs/refine/M07.md | claude --print

# or codex CLI
cat docs/refine/M07.md | codex exec --stdin

# or loop all modules · ouputs to PR-style patches
for f in docs/refine/*.md; do
  cat "$f" | claude --print > docs/refine/_patches/$(basename $f .md).patch.yaml
done

# then apply all patches
for p in docs/refine/_patches/*.patch.yaml; do
  mod_id=$(basename $p .patch.yaml)
  docs-cockpit apply-patch "docs/spec/module/${mod_id}-*.md" "$p" --apply
done
```
